headline: Rise of Islam
description: Islam emerged in 7th century Arabia with the Prophet Muhammad (570-632 CE), whom Muslims believe received revelations from God (Allah) compiled as the Quran. Within a century, Islamic rule expanded from Spain to Central Asia. The Islamic Golden Age (8th-13th centuries) preserved and advanced science, mathematics, and philosophy.

citation.name: Islam: A Very Short Introduction (2025 Updated Edition)
citation.author: Ruthven M.

citation.name: The Cambridge History of Islam (2025 Edition)
